function.arguments:
{"db_name": "support", "query": "
WITH ClosedCases AS (
    SELECT 
        c.id as case_id, 
        c.ownerid as agent_id, 
        c.createddate, 
        c.closeddate
    FROM "Case" c
    WHERE c.createddate >= '2023-05-02'::timestamp
        AND c.closeddate IS NOT NULL 
        AND c.closeddate != 'None'
        AND c.status = 'Closed'
),
OwnerAssignmentCount AS (
    SELECT 
        ch.caseid__c,
        COUNT(*) as assignment_count
    FROM casehistory__c ch
    WHERE ch.field__c = 'Owner Assignment'
        AND ch.caseid__c IN (SELECT case_id FROM ClosedCases)
    GROUP BY ch.caseid__c
),
NonTransferredCases AS (
    SELECT 
        cc.case_id,
        cc.agent_id,
        cc.createddate,
        cc.closeddate,
        EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (cc.closeddate - cc.createddate))/3600.0 as handle_time_hours
    FROM ClosedCases cc
    JOIN OwnerAssignmentCount oac ON cc.case_id = oac.caseid__c
    WHERE oac.assignment_count = 1
)
SELECT 
    agent_id,
    COUNT(*) as case_count,
    AVG(handle_time_hours) as avg_handle_time_hours
FROM NonTransferredCases
WHERE agent_id IS NOT NULL
    AND agent_id != ''
    AND agent_id != 'None'
GROUP BY agent_id
HAVING COUNT(*) > 1
ORDER BY avg_handle_time_hours ASC
LIMIT 10
"}

{"db_name": "support", "query": "
WITH ClosedCases AS (
    SELECT 
        c.id as case_id, 
        c.ownerid as agent_id, 
        c.createddate, 
        c.closeddate
    FROM "Case" c
    WHERE c.createddate >= '2023-05-02'
        AND c.closeddate IS NOT NULL 
        AND c.closeddate != 'None'
        AND (c.status = 'Closed' OR c.status LIKE 'Closed%')
),
OwnerAssignmentCount AS (
    SELECT 
        ch.caseid__c,
        COUNT(*) as assignment_count
    FROM casehistory__c ch
    WHERE ch.field__c = 'Owner Assignment'
        AND ch.caseid__c IN (SELECT case_id FROM ClosedCases)
    GROUP BY ch.caseid__c
),
NonTransferredCases AS (
    SELECT 
        cc.case_id,
        cc.agent_id,
        cc.createddate,
        cc.closeddate,
        EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (TO_TIMESTAMP(cc.closeddate, 'YYYY-MM-DD"T"HH24:MI:SS.USOF') - 
                           TO_TIMESTAMP(cc.createddate, 'YYYY-MM-DD"T"HH24:MI:SS.USOF')))/3600.0 as handle_time_hours
    FROM ClosedCases cc
    JOIN OwnerAssignmentCount oac ON cc.case_id = oac.caseid__c
    WHERE oac.assignment_count = 1
)
SELECT 
    agent_id,
    COUNT(*) as case_count,
    AVG(handle_time_hours) as avg_handle_time_hours
FROM NonTransferredCases
WHERE agent_id IS NOT NULL
    AND agent_id != ''
    AND agent_id != 'None'
    AND agent_id NOT LIKE '#%'
GROUP BY agent_id
HAVING COUNT(*) > 1
ORDER BY avg_handle_time_hours ASC
LIMIT 1
"}

{"db_name": "support", "query": "
WITH ClosedCases AS (
    SELECT 
        c.id as case_id,
        TRIM(c.ownerid, '#') as agent_id,
        c.createddate,
        c.closeddate
    FROM "Case" c
    WHERE c.createddate >= '2023-05-02'
        AND c.closeddate IS NOT NULL 
        AND c.closeddate != 'None'
        AND TRIM(c.status) = 'Closed'
        AND c.ownerid IS NOT NULL
        AND TRIM(c.ownerid, '#') != ''
        AND TRIM(c.ownerid, '#') != 'None'
),
OwnerAssignmentCount AS (
    SELECT 
        ch.caseid__c,
        COUNT(*) as assignment_count
    FROM casehistory__c ch
    WHERE ch.field__c = 'Owner Assignment'
        AND ch.caseid__c IN (SELECT case_id FROM ClosedCases)
    GROUP BY ch.caseid__c
)
SELECT 
    cc.agent_id,
    COUNT(*) as case_count,
    AVG(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM 
        (TO_TIMESTAMP(cc.closeddate, 'YYYY-MM-DD"T"HH24:MI:SS.USOF') - 
         TO_TIMESTAMP(cc.createddate, 'YYYY-MM-DD"T"HH24:MI:SS.USOF')))/3600.0
    ) as avg_handle_time_hours
FROM ClosedCases cc
JOIN OwnerAssignmentCount oac ON cc.case_id = oac.caseid__c
WHERE oac.assignment_count = 1
GROUP BY cc.agent_id
HAVING COUNT(*) > 1
ORDER BY avg_handle_time_hours ASC
LIMIT 1
"}

    SELECT 
        c.id as case_id,
        TRIM(BOTH '#' FROM c.ownerid) as agent_id,
        c.createddate,
        c.closeddate
    FROM "Case" c
    WHERE c.createddate >= '2023-05-02'
        AND c.closeddate IS NOT NULL 
        AND c.closeddate != 'None'
        AND TRIM(c.status) = 'Closed'
),
OwnerAssignmentCount AS (
    SELECT 
        ch.caseid__c,
        COUNT(*) as assignment_count
    FROM casehistory__c ch
    WHERE ch.field__c = 'Owner Assignment'
        AND ch.caseid__c IN (SELECT case_id FROM ClosedCases)
    GROUP BY ch.caseid__c
),
NonTransferredCases AS (
    SELECT 
        cc.case_id,
        cc.agent_id,
        cc.createddate,
        cc.closeddate
    FROM ClosedCases cc
    JOIN OwnerAssignmentCount oac ON cc.case_id = oac.caseid__c
    WHERE oac.assignment_count = 1
),
AgentStats AS (
    SELECT 
        agent_id,
        COUNT(*) as case_count
    FROM NonTransferredCases
    WHERE agent_id IS NOT NULL
        AND agent_id != 'None'
    GROUP BY agent_id
    HAVING COUNT(*) >= 2
)
SELECT 
    asts.agent_id,
    asts.case_count,
    ROUND(AVG(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM 
        (TO_TIMESTAMP(ntc.closeddate, 'YYYY-MM-DD"T"HH24:MI:SS.USOF') - 
         TO_TIMESTAMP(ntc.createddate, 'YYYY-MM-DD"T"HH24:MI:SS.USOF')))/3600.0
    ), 2) as avg_handle_time_hours
FROM NonTransferredCases ntc
JOIN AgentStats asts ON ntc.agent_id = asts.agent_id
GROUP BY asts.agent_id, asts.case_count
ORDER BY avg_handle_time_hours ASC
LIMIT 5
"}

function.arguments:
{"db_name": "support", "query": "
-- Just get all closed cases in the past 4 months and count them
SELECT 
    c.id as case_id,
    TRIM(BOTH '#' FROM c.ownerid) as agent_id,
    c.status,
    CASE 
        WHEN c.closeddate != 'None' AND c.closeddate IS NOT NULL THEN 'has_closed'
        ELSE 'no_closed'
    END as closed_status_check
FROM "Case" c
WHERE c.createddate >= '2023-05-02'
    AND c.createddate <= '2023-09-02'
    AND c.closeddate IS NOT NULL 
    AND c.closeddate != 'None'
LIMIT 20
"}

function.arguments:
{"db_name": "support", "query": "
WITH ClosedCases AS (
    SELECT 
        c.id as case_id,
        TRIM(BOTH '#' FROM c.ownerid) as agent_id,
        c.createddate,
        c.closeddate
    FROM "Case" c
    WHERE c.createddate >= '2023-05-02'
        AND c.createddate <= '2023-09-02'
        AND c.closeddate IS NOT NULL 
        AND c.closeddate != 'None'
        AND TRIM(c.status) = 'Closed'
        AND c.ownerid IS NOT NULL
        AND TRIM(BOTH '#' FROM c.ownerid) != ''
        AND TRIM(BOTH '#' FROM c.ownerid) != 'None'
),
OwnerAssignmentCount AS (
    SELECT 
        ch.caseid__c,
        COUNT(*) as assignment_count
    FROM casehistory__c ch
    WHERE ch.field__c = 'Owner Assignment'
        AND ch.caseid__c IN (SELECT case_id FROM ClosedCases)
    GROUP BY ch.caseid__c
),
NonTransferredCases AS (
    SELECT 
        cc.case_id,
        cc.agent_id,
        cc.createddate,
        cc.closeddate,
        EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM 
            (TO_TIMESTAMP(cc.closeddate, 'YYYY-MM-DD"T"HH24:MI:SS.USOF') - 
             TO_TIMESTAMP(cc.createddate, 'YYYY-MM-DD"T"HH24:MI:SS.USOF'))
        ) / 3600.0 as handle_time_hours
    FROM ClosedCases cc
    JOIN OwnerAssignmentCount oac ON cc.case_id = oac.caseid__c
    WHERE oac.assignment_count = 1
),
AgentStats AS (
    SELECT 
        agent_id,
        COUNT(*) as case_count,
        AVG(handle_time_hours) as avg_handle_time_hours
    FROM NonTransferredCases
    WHERE agent_id IS NOT NULL
    GROUP BY agent_id
    HAVING COUNT(*) > 1
)
SELECT agent_id
FROM AgentStats
ORDER BY avg_handle_time_hours ASC
LIMIT 1
"}

function.arguments:
{"db_name": "support", "query": "
WITH ClosedCases AS (
    SELECT 
        c.id as case_id,
        TRIM(BOTH '#' FROM c.ownerid) as final_agent_id,
        c.createddate,
        c.closeddate
    FROM "Case" c
    WHERE c.createddate >= '2023-05-02'
        AND c.createddate <= '2023-09-02'
        AND TRIM(c.status) = 'Closed'
        AND c.closeddate IS NOT NULL
        AND c.closeddate != 'None'
),
CaseAssignmentCounts AS (
    SELECT 
        ch.caseid__c as case_id,
        COUNT(*) as assignment_count,
        MAX(ch.newvalue__c) as final_owner_from_history
    FROM casehistory__c ch
    WHERE ch.field__c = 'Owner Assignment'
        AND ch.caseid__c IN (SELECT case_id FROM ClosedCases)
    GROUP BY ch.caseid__c
),
NonTransferredCases AS (
    SELECT 
        cc.case_id,
        cc.final_agent_id,
        cc.createddate,
        cc.closeddate,
        EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM 
            (TO_TIMESTAMP(cc.closeddate, 'YYYY-MM-DD"T"HH24:MI:SS.USOF') - 
             TO_TIMESTAMP(cc.createddate, 'YYYY-MM-DD"T"HH24:MI:SS.USOF'))
        ) / 3600.0 as handle_time_hours
    FROM ClosedCases cc
    JOIN CaseAssignmentCounts cac ON cc.case_id = cac.case_id
    WHERE cac.assignment_count = 1
),
AgentCaseCounts AS (
    SELECT 
        final_agent_id as agent_id,
        COUNT(*) as case_count
    FROM NonTransferredCases
    WHERE final_agent_id IS NOT NULL
        AND final_agent_id != 'None'
    GROUP BY final_agent_id
    HAVING COUNT(*) > 1
),
AgentAvgHandleTime AS (
    SELECT 
        ntc.final_agent_id as agent_id,
        AVG(ntc.handle_time_hours) as avg_handle_time_hours
    FROM NonTransferredCases ntc
    JOIN AgentCaseCounts acc ON ntc.final_agent_id = acc.agent_id
    GROUP BY ntc.final_agent_id
)
SELECT 
    agent_id,
    ROUND(avg_handle_time_hours::numeric, 2) as avg_hours
FROM AgentAvgHandleTime
ORDER BY avg_handle_time_hours ASC
LIMIT 10
"}

{"db_name": "support", "query": "
SELECT TRIM(BOTH '#' FROM c.ownerid) as agent_id,
       COUNT(*) as total_cases,
       MIN(c.createddate) as earliest,
       MAX(c.createddate) as latest
FROM "Case" c
WHERE c.createddate >= '2023-05-02'
  AND c.createddate <= '2023-09-02'
  AND TRIM(c.status) = 'Closed'
  AND c.closeddate != 'None'
GROUP BY TRIM(BOTH '#' FROM c.ownerid)
HAVING COUNT(*) > 1
ORDER BY total_cases DESC
LIMIT 20
"}

function.arguments:
{"db_name": "support", "query": "
WITH ClosedCases AS (
  SELECT 
    c.id as case_id,
    TRIM(BOTH '#' FROM c.ownerid) as agent_id,
    c.createddate,
    c.closeddate
  FROM "Case" c
  WHERE c.createddate >= '2023-05-02' 
    AND c.createddate <= '2023-09-02'
    AND TRIM(c.status) = 'Closed'
    AND c.closeddate != 'None'
),
AssignmentCounts AS (
  SELECT 
    ch.caseid__c as case_id,
    COUNT(*) as assignment_count
  FROM casehistory__c ch
  WHERE ch.field__c = 'Owner Assignment'
    AND ch.caseid__c IN (SELECT case_id FROM ClosedCases)
  GROUP BY ch.caseid__c
),
SingleOwnerCases AS (
  SELECT 
    cc.case_id,
    cc.agent_id,
    EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM 
      (TO_TIMESTAMP(cc.closeddate, 'YYYY-MM-DD"T"HH24:MI:SS.USOF') - 
       TO_TIMESTAMP(cc.createddate, 'YYYY-MM-DD"T"HH24:MI:SS.USOF'))
    ) / 3600.0 as handle_hours
  FROM ClosedCases cc
  JOIN AssignmentCounts ac ON cc.case_id = ac.case_id
  WHERE ac.assignment_count = 1
)
SELECT 
  agent_id,
  COUNT(*) as case_count,
  AVG(handle_hours) as avg_handle_hours
FROM SingleOwnerCases
WHERE agent_id IS NOT NULL
  AND agent_id != ''
GROUP BY agent_id
HAVING COUNT(*) > 1
ORDER BY avg_handle_hours ASC
LIMIT 5
"}

SELECT 
  c.id as case_id,
  TRIM(BOTH '#' FROM c.ownerid) as agent_id,
  EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM 
    (TO_TIMESTAMP(c.closeddate, 'YYYY-MM-DD"T"HH24:MI:SS.USOF') - 
     TO_TIMESTAMP(c.createddate, 'YYYY-MM-DD"T"HH24:MI:SS.USOF'))
  ) / 3600.0 as handle_hours,
  c.createddate,
  c.closeddate
FROM "Case" c
WHERE c.createddate >= '2023-05-02'
  AND c.createddate <= '2023-09-02'
  AND TRIM(c.status) = 'Closed'
  AND c.closeddate != 'None'
  AND c.closeddate IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY c.createddate DESC
"}

function.arguments:
{"db_name": "support", "query": "
-- Main query to find agents who processed 2+ cases (non-transferred) with lowest avg handle time
WITH ClosedCases AS (
  SELECT 
    c.id as case_id,
    TRIM(BOTH '#' FROM c.ownerid) as agent_id,
    c.createddate,
    c.closeddate
  FROM "Case" c
  WHERE c.createddate >= '2023-05-02'
    AND c.createddate <= '2023-09-02'
    AND TRIM(c.status) = 'Closed'
    AND c.closeddate != 'None'
    AND c.closeddate IS NOT NULL
),
OwnerAssignmentCounts AS (
  SELECT 
    ch.caseid__c as case_id,
    COUNT(*) as assignment_count
  FROM casehistory__c ch
  WHERE ch.field__c = 'Owner Assignment'
    AND ch.caseid__c IN (SELECT case_id FROM ClosedCases)
  GROUP BY ch.caseid__c
),
NonTransferredCases AS (
  SELECT 
    cc.case_id,
    cc.agent_id,
    cc.createddate,
    cc.closeddate,
    EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM 
      (TO_TIMESTAMP(cc.closeddate, 'YYYY-MM-DD"T"HH24:MI:SS.USOF') - 
       TO_TIMESTAMP(cc.createddate, 'YYYY-MM-DD"T"HH24:MI:SS.USOF'))
    ) / 3600.0 as handle_time_hours
  FROM ClosedCases cc
  JOIN OwnerAssignmentCounts oac ON cc.case_id = oac.case_id
  WHERE oac.assignment_count = 1
),
AgentStats AS (
  SELECT 
    agent_id,
    COUNT(*) as case_count,
    AVG(handle_time_hours) as avg_handle_time_hours
  FROM NonTransferredCases
  WHERE agent_id IS NOT NULL
    AND agent_id != ''
  GROUP BY agent_id
  HAVING COUNT(*) > 1
)
SELECT agent_id
FROM AgentStats
ORDER BY avg_handle_time_hours ASC
LIMIT 1
"}

function.arguments:
{"db_name": "support", "query": "
-- Normalize all IDs by trimming # from both case and case history
WITH ClosedCases AS (
  SELECT 
    TRIM(BOTH '#' FROM c.id) as case_id,
    TRIM(BOTH '#' FROM c.ownerid) as agent_id,
    c.createddate,
    c.closeddate
  FROM "Case" c
  WHERE c.createddate >= '2023-05-02'
    AND c.createddate <= '2023-09-02'
    AND TRIM(c.status) = 'Closed'
    AND c.closeddate != 'None'
    AND c.closeddate IS NOT NULL
),
AssignmentCounts AS (
  SELECT 
    TRIM(BOTH '#' FROM ch.caseid__c) as case_id,
    COUNT(*) as assignment_count
  FROM casehistory__c ch
  WHERE ch.field__c = 'Owner Assignment'
  GROUP BY TRIM(BOTH '#' FROM ch.caseid__c)
)
SELECT 
  cc.agent_id,
  COUNT(*) as num_cases,
  AVG(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM 
    (TO_TIMESTAMP(cc.closeddate, 'YYYY-MM-DD"T"HH24:MI:SS.USOF') - 
     TO_TIMESTAMP(cc.createddate, 'YYYY-MM-DD"T"HH24:MI:SS.USOF'))
  ) / 3600.0) as avg_hours
FROM ClosedCases cc
JOIN AssignmentCounts ac ON cc.case_id = ac.case_id
WHERE ac.assignment_count = 1
  AND cc.agent_id != ''
GROUP BY cc.agent_id
HAVING COUNT(*) > 1
ORDER BY avg_hours ASC
LIMIT 1
"}

{"db_name": "support", "query": "
WITH ClosedCases AS (
  SELECT 
    TRIM(BOTH '#' FROM c.id) as case_id,
    TRIM(BOTH '#' FROM c.ownerid) as agent_id,
    c.createddate,
    c.closeddate
  FROM "Case" c
  WHERE c.createddate >= '2023-05-02'
    AND c.createddate <= '2023-09-02'
    AND TRIM(c.status) = 'Closed'
    AND c.closeddate IS NOT NULL
    AND c.closeddate != 'None'
),
CaseAssignments AS (
  SELECT 
    TRIM(BOTH '#' FROM ch.caseid__c) as case_id,
    ch.field__c
  FROM casehistory__c ch
  WHERE ch.field__c = 'Owner Assignment'
)
SELECT 
  cc.agent_id,
  COUNT(DISTINCT cc.case_id) as case_count,
  COUNT(DISTINCT ca.case_id) as assignment_count
FROM ClosedCases cc
LEFT JOIN CaseAssignments ca ON cc.case_id = ca.case_id
GROUP BY cc.agent_id
HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT cc.case_id) > 1
ORDER BY cc.agent_id
LIMIT 10
"}

WITH ClosedCases AS (

    TRIM(BOTH '#' FROM c.ownerid) as agent_id,

message.reasoning:
The user is asking: "In the past four months, which agent had the lowest average handle time for those processing more than one case? Return only the Id of the agent."

Today's date: 2023-09-02

So past four months would be from 2023-05-02 to 2023-09-02.

Data is in the "support" database (PostgreSQL), specifically in the "Case" table and "casehistory__c" table.

According to the policy:
- Handle time is duration from when case is opened to when it is closed
- We need to filter for cases that are NOT transferred (so only one 'Owner Assignment' in case history)
- Agent must have processed more than one case (COUNT(*) > 1)

Let me trace what I've done:

1. First tried to list tables, queried some sample data
2. Made attempts to use complex CTEs to:
   - Get closed cases in date range
   - Join with casehistory__c to count assignments
   - Filter for non-transferred (count = 1)
   - Calculate handle time
   - Group by agent
   - Filter agents with > 1 case
   - Get lowest avg handle time

The queries kept returning empty results. Let me try to debug systematically.

The issue might be:
1. Date comparisons might not work correctly (text fields)
2. Status might have trailing spaces
3. ID matching might need normalization
4. Closed cases might not exist in the date range

From query_db_50, I saw there are closed cases. From query_db_72, there are exactly 7 closed cases in the date range. From query_db_60, I saw 7 closed cases with calculated handle times.

Wait, but in query_db_74 and query_db_78, the counts are returning 0. This means the HAVING COUNT(*) > 1 condition is not being met.

Let me check what the agent_id distribution is. Even though there are 7 closed cases, they might all belong to different agents. If no agent has more than 1 case, the query would be empty.

Let me test this hypothesis by getting the agent case counts first without the HAVING filter.

QUERY:
In the past four months, which agent had the lowest average handle time for those processing more than one case? Return only the Id of the agent.

## Handle Time Policy
- Definition: The duration taken to close a case. Specifically, it is the time from when a case is opened to when it is closed.
- In the queries that specify 'agents managed/queries x cases' -- this filter applies to both the first agent that the case was first assigned to and the agent that the case was transferred to. This means that if an agent has 2 cases that was initially assigned to itself by admin and 1 case transferred from another agent, a filter like 'handled/managed at least 3 cases' would not filter this agent out.
- When computing handle time, we do not compute handle time for cases that have been transferred to other agents.
- For cases that have NOT been transferred to an other agent, there will be only ONE 'Owner Assignment', and for those that have been transferred, there will be MORE THAN ONE 'Owner Assignment'.

## Today's date: 2023-09-02

DATABASE DESCRIPTION:
You are working with six databases to solve this query.

Here are the descriptions of these six databases:

1. core_crm
   - This database is stored in a SQLite database and contains core CRM data including users, accounts, and contacts from Salesforce CRMArena.
   - This database consists of three tables:
    - User: Sales team information
      - Fields: Id, FirstName, LastName, Email, Phone, Username, Alias, LanguageLocaleKey, EmailEncodingKey, TimeZoneSidKey, LocaleSidKey
    - Account: Company/customer data
      - Fields: Id, Name, Phone, Industry, Description, NumberOfEmployees, ShippingState
    - Contact: Individual contacts
      - Fields: Id, FirstName, LastName, Email, AccountId

2. sales_pipeline
   - This database is stored in a DuckDB database and contains sales pipeline data including opportunities, quotes, contracts, and leads.
   - This database consists of six tables:
     - Contract: Signed contracts
      - Fields: Id, AccountId, Status, StartDate, CustomerSignedDate, CompanySignedDate, Description, ContractTerm
     - Lead: Sales leads
      - Fields: Id, FirstName, LastName, Email, Phone, Company, Status, ConvertedContactId, ConvertedAccountId, Title, CreatedDate, ConvertedDate, IsConverted, OwnerId
     - Opportunity: Sales deals
      - Fields: Id, ContractID__c, AccountId, ContactId, OwnerId, Probability, Amount, StageName, Name, Description, CreatedDate, CloseDate
     - OpportunityLineItem: Deal line items
      - Fields: Id, OpportunityId, Product2Id, PricebookEntryId, Quantity, TotalPrice
     - Quote: Price quotes
      - Fields: Id, OpportunityId, AccountId, ContactId, Name, Description, Status, CreatedDate, ExpirationDate
     - QuoteLineItem: Quote details
      - Fields: Id, QuoteId, OpportunityLineItemId, Product2Id, PricebookEntryId, Quantity, UnitPrice, Discount, TotalPrice

3. support
   - This database is stored in a PostgreSQL database and contains customer support data including cases, knowledge articles, and communications.
   - This database consists of six tables:
     - Case: Support cases
      - Fields: id, priority, subject, description, status, contactid, createddate, closeddate, orderitemid__c, issueid__c, accountid, ownerid
     - knowledge__kav: Knowledge articles
      - Fields: id, title, faq_answer__c, summary, urlname
     - issue__c: Custom issues
      - Fields: id, name, description__c
     - casehistory__c: Case history
      - Fields: id, caseid__c, oldvalue__c, newvalue__c, createddate, field__c
     - emailmessage: Email communications
      - Fields: id, subject, textbody, parentid, fromaddress, toids, messagedate, relatedtoid
     - livechattranscript: Chat logs
      - Fields: id, caseid, accountid, ownerid, body, endtime, livechatvisitorid, contactid

4. products_orders
   - This database is stored in a SQLite database and contains product catalog and order data.
   - This database consists of seven tables:
     - ProductCategory: Product categories
      - Fields: Id, Name, CatalogId
     - Product2: Product catalog
      - Fields: Id, Name, Description, IsActive, External_ID__c
     - ProductCategoryProduct: one of the pricing and mapping tables
      - Fields: Id, ProductCategoryId, ProductId
     - Pricebook2: one of the pricing and mapping tables
      - Fields: Id, Name, Description, IsActive, ValidFrom, ValidTo
     - PricebookEntry: one of the pricing and mapping tables
      - Fields: Id, Pricebook2Id, Product2Id, UnitPrice
     - Order: Customer orders
      - Fields: Id, AccountId, Status, EffectiveDate, Pricebook2Id, OwnerId
     - OrderItem: Order details
      - Fields: Id, OrderId, Product2Id, Quantity, UnitPrice, PriceBookEntryId

5. activities
   - This database is stored in a DuckDB database and contains activity data including tasks, events, and voice call transcripts.
   - This database consists of three tables:
     - Event: Calendar events
      - Fields: Id, WhatId, OwnerId, StartDateTime, Subject, Description, DurationInMinutes, Location, IsAllDayEvent
     - Task: Activities and tasks
      - Fields: Id, WhatId, OwnerId, Priority, Status, ActivityDate, Subject, Description
     - VoiceCallTranscript__c: Call records
      - Fields: Id, OpportunityId__c, LeadId__c, Body__c, CreatedDate, EndTime__c

6. territory
   - This database is stored in a SQLite database and contains sales territory management data.
   - This database consists of two tables:
     - Territory2: Sales territories
      - Fields: Id, Name, Description
     - UserTerritory2Association: Territory assignments
      - Id, UserId, Territory2Id

HINTS: 
- ~25% of ID-like fields may include a leading # (e.g., #001Wt00000PFj4zIAD).
- ~20% of text fields may contain trailing whitespace (e.g., "Company Name ").
- Corruption may appear in: Id, AccountId, ContactId, Name, FirstName, LastName, Email, Subject, Status.
- Corruption handling is needed for reliable joins
- Domain-specific CRM knowledge is required

function.arguments:
{"db_name": "support", "query": "
WITH ClosedCases AS (
    SELECT 
        c.id as case_id, 
        c.ownerid as agent_id, 
        c.createddate, 
        c.closeddate
    FROM "Case" c
    WHERE c.createddate >= '2023-05-02'::timestamp
        AND c.closeddate IS NOT NULL 
        AND c.closeddate != 'None'
        AND c.status = 'Closed'
),
OwnerAssignmentCount AS (
    SELECT 
        ch.caseid__c,
        COUNT(*) as assignment_count
    FROM casehistory__c ch
    WHERE ch.field__c = 'Owner Assignment'
        AND ch.caseid__c IN (SELECT case_id FROM ClosedCases)
    GROUP BY ch.caseid__c
),
NonTransferredCases AS (
    SELECT 
        cc.case_id,
        cc.agent_id,
        cc.createddate,
        cc.closeddate,
        EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (cc.closeddate - cc.createddate))/3600.0 as handle_time_hours
    FROM ClosedCases cc
    JOIN OwnerAssignmentCount oac ON cc.case_id = oac.caseid__c
    WHERE oac.assignment_count = 1
)
SELECT 
    agent_id,
    COUNT(*) as case_count,
    AVG(handle_time_hours) as avg_handle_time_hours
FROM NonTransferredCases
WHERE agent_id IS NOT NULL
    AND agent_id != ''
    AND agent_id != 'None'
GROUP BY agent_id
HAVING COUNT(*) > 1
ORDER BY avg_handle_time_hours ASC
LIMIT 10
"}

function.arguments:
{"db_name": "support", "query": "
WITH ClosedCases AS (
    SELECT 
        c.id as case_id, 
        c.ownerid as agent_id, 
        c.createddate, 
        c.closeddate
    FROM "Case" c
    WHERE c.createddate >= '2023-05-02'
        AND c.closeddate IS NOT NULL 
        AND c.closeddate != 'None'
        AND (c.status = 'Closed' OR c.status LIKE 'Closed%')
),
OwnerAssignmentCount AS (
    SELECT 
        ch.caseid__c,
        COUNT(*) as assignment_count
    FROM casehistory__c ch
    WHERE ch.field__c = 'Owner Assignment'
        AND ch.caseid__c IN (SELECT case_id FROM ClosedCases)
    GROUP BY ch.caseid__c
),
NonTransferredCases AS (
    SELECT 
        cc.case_id,
        cc.agent_id,
        cc.createddate,
        cc.closeddate,
        EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (TO_TIMESTAMP(cc.closeddate, 'YYYY-MM-DD"T"HH24:MI:SS.USOF') - 
                           TO_TIMESTAMP(cc.createddate, 'YYYY-MM-DD"T"HH24:MI:SS.USOF')))/3600.0 as handle_time_hours
    FROM ClosedCases cc
    JOIN OwnerAssignmentCount oac ON cc.case_id = oac.caseid__c
    WHERE oac.assignment_count = 1
)
SELECT 
    agent_id,
    COUNT(*) as case_count,
    AVG(handle_time_hours) as avg_handle_time_hours
FROM NonTransferredCases
WHERE agent_id IS NOT NULL
    AND agent_id != ''
    AND agent_id != 'None'
    AND agent_id NOT LIKE '#%'
GROUP BY agent_id
HAVING COUNT(*) > 1
ORDER BY avg_handle_time_hours ASC
LIMIT 1
"}

function.arguments:
{"db_name": "support", "query": "
WITH ClosedCases AS (
    SELECT 
        c.id as case_id,
        TRIM(c.ownerid, '#') as agent_id,
        c.createddate,
        c.closeddate
    FROM "Case" c
    WHERE c.createddate >= '2023-05-02'
        AND c.closeddate IS NOT NULL 
        AND c.closeddate != 'None'
        AND TRIM(c.status) = 'Closed'
        AND c.ownerid IS NOT NULL
        AND TRIM(c.ownerid, '#') != ''
        AND TRIM(c.ownerid, '#') != 'None'
),
OwnerAssignmentCount AS (
    SELECT 
        ch.caseid__c,
        COUNT(*) as assignment_count
    FROM casehistory__c ch
    WHERE ch.field__c = 'Owner Assignment'
        AND ch.caseid__c IN (SELECT case_id FROM ClosedCases)
    GROUP BY ch.caseid__c
)
SELECT 
    cc.agent_id,
    COUNT(*) as case_count,
    AVG(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM 
        (TO_TIMESTAMP(cc.closeddate, 'YYYY-MM-DD"T"HH24:MI:SS.USOF') - 
         TO_TIMESTAMP(cc.createddate, 'YYYY-MM-DD"T"HH24:MI:SS.USOF')))/3600.0
    ) as avg_handle_time_hours
FROM ClosedCases cc
JOIN OwnerAssignmentCount oac ON cc.case_id = oac.caseid__c
WHERE oac.assignment_count = 1
GROUP BY cc.agent_id
HAVING COUNT(*) > 1
ORDER BY avg_handle_time_hours ASC
LIMIT 1
"}

function.arguments:
{"db_name": "support", "query": "
WITH ClosedCases AS (
    SELECT 
        c.id as case_id,
        TRIM(BOTH '#' FROM c.ownerid) as agent_id,
        c.createddate,
        c.closeddate
    FROM "Case" c
    WHERE c.createddate >= '2023-05-02'
        AND c.closeddate IS NOT NULL 
        AND c.closeddate != 'None'
        AND TRIM(c.status) = 'Closed'
),
OwnerAssignmentCount AS (
    SELECT 
        ch.caseid__c,
        COUNT(*) as assignment_count
    FROM casehistory__c ch
    WHERE ch.field__c = 'Owner Assignment'
        AND ch.caseid__c IN (SELECT case_id FROM ClosedCases)
    GROUP BY ch.caseid__c
),
NonTransferredCases AS (
    SELECT 
        cc.case_id,
        cc.agent_id,
        cc.createddate,
        cc.closeddate
    FROM ClosedCases cc
    JOIN OwnerAssignmentCount oac ON cc.case_id = oac.caseid__c
    WHERE oac.assignment_count = 1
),
AgentStats AS (
    SELECT 
        agent_id,
        COUNT(*) as case_count
    FROM NonTransferredCases
    WHERE agent_id IS NOT NULL
        AND agent_id != 'None'
    GROUP BY agent_id
    HAVING COUNT(*) >= 2
)
SELECT 
    asts.agent_id,
    asts.case_count,
    ROUND(AVG(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM 
        (TO_TIMESTAMP(ntc.closeddate, 'YYYY-MM-DD"T"HH24:MI:SS.USOF') - 
         TO_TIMESTAMP(ntc.createddate, 'YYYY-MM-DD"T"HH24:MI:SS.USOF')))/3600.0
    ), 2) as avg_handle_time_hours
FROM NonTransferredCases ntc
JOIN AgentStats asts ON ntc.agent_id = asts.agent_id
GROUP BY asts.agent_id, asts.case_count
ORDER BY avg_handle_time_hours ASC
LIMIT 5
"}

function.arguments:
{"db_name": "support", "query": "
-- Just get all closed cases in the past 4 months and count them
SELECT 
    c.id as case_id,
    TRIM(BOTH '#' FROM c.ownerid) as agent_id,
    c.status,
    CASE 
        WHEN c.closeddate != 'None' AND c.closeddate IS NOT NULL THEN 'has_closed'
        ELSE 'no_closed'
    END as closed_status_check
FROM "Case" c
WHERE c.createddate >= '2023-05-02'
    AND c.createddate <= '2023-09-02'
    AND c.closeddate IS NOT NULL 
    AND c.closeddate != 'None'
LIMIT 20
"}

function.arguments:
{"db_name": "support", "query": "
WITH ClosedCases AS (
    SELECT 
        c.id as case_id,
        TRIM(BOTH '#' FROM c.ownerid) as agent_id,
        c.createddate,
        c.closeddate
    FROM "Case" c
    WHERE c.createddate >= '2023-05-02'
        AND c.createddate <= '2023-09-02'
        AND c.closeddate IS NOT NULL 
        AND c.closeddate != 'None'
        AND TRIM(c.status) = 'Closed'
        AND c.ownerid IS NOT NULL
        AND TRIM(BOTH '#' FROM c.ownerid) != ''
        AND TRIM(BOTH '#' FROM c.ownerid) != 'None'
),
OwnerAssignmentCount AS (
    SELECT 
        ch.caseid__c,
        COUNT(*) as assignment_count
    FROM casehistory__c ch
    WHERE ch.field__c = 'Owner Assignment'
        AND ch.caseid__c IN (SELECT case_id FROM ClosedCases)
    GROUP BY ch.caseid__c
),
NonTransferredCases AS (
    SELECT 
        cc.case_id,
        cc.agent_id,
        cc.createddate,
        cc.closeddate,
        EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM 
            (TO_TIMESTAMP(cc.closeddate, 'YYYY-MM-DD"T"HH24:MI:SS.USOF') - 
             TO_TIMESTAMP(cc.createddate, 'YYYY-MM-DD"T"HH24:MI:SS.USOF'))
        ) / 3600.0 as handle_time_hours
    FROM ClosedCases cc
    JOIN OwnerAssignmentCount oac ON cc.case_id = oac.caseid__c
    WHERE oac.assignment_count = 1
),
AgentStats AS (
    SELECT 
        agent_id,
        COUNT(*) as case_count,
        AVG(handle_time_hours) as avg_handle_time_hours
    FROM NonTransferredCases
    WHERE agent_id IS NOT NULL
    GROUP BY agent_id
    HAVING COUNT(*) > 1
)
SELECT agent_id
FROM AgentStats
ORDER BY avg_handle_time_hours ASC
LIMIT 1
"}

-- Check data quality
SELECT 
    c.id,
    c.createddate,
    c.closeddate,
    TRIM(BOTH '#' FROM c.ownerid) as agent_id,
    c.status
FROM "Case" c
WHERE c.status IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY c.createddate DESC
LIMIT 10
"}

function.arguments:
{"db_name": "support", "query": "
WITH ClosedCases AS (
    SELECT 
        c.id as case_id,
        TRIM(BOTH '#' FROM c.ownerid) as final_agent_id,
        c.createddate,
        c.closeddate
    FROM "Case" c
    WHERE c.createddate >= '2023-05-02'
        AND c.createddate <= '2023-09-02'
        AND TRIM(c.status) = 'Closed'
        AND c.closeddate IS NOT NULL
        AND c.closeddate != 'None'
),
CaseAssignmentCounts AS (
    SELECT 
        ch.caseid__c as case_id,
        COUNT(*) as assignment_count,
        MAX(ch.newvalue__c) as final_owner_from_history
    FROM casehistory__c ch
    WHERE ch.field__c = 'Owner Assignment'
        AND ch.caseid__c IN (SELECT case_id FROM ClosedCases)
    GROUP BY ch.caseid__c
),
NonTransferredCases AS (
    SELECT 
        cc.case_id,
        cc.final_agent_id,
        cc.createddate,
        cc.closeddate,
        EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM 
            (TO_TIMESTAMP(cc.closeddate, 'YYYY-MM-DD"T"HH24:MI:SS.USOF') - 
             TO_TIMESTAMP(cc.createddate, 'YYYY-MM-DD"T"HH24:MI:SS.USOF'))
        ) / 3600.0 as handle_time_hours
    FROM ClosedCases cc
    JOIN CaseAssignmentCounts cac ON cc.case_id = cac.case_id
    WHERE cac.assignment_count = 1
),
AgentCaseCounts AS (
    SELECT 
        final_agent_id as agent_id,
        COUNT(*) as case_count
    FROM NonTransferredCases
    WHERE final_agent_id IS NOT NULL
        AND final_agent_id != 'None'
    GROUP BY final_agent_id
    HAVING COUNT(*) > 1
),
AgentAvgHandleTime AS (
    SELECT 
        ntc.final_agent_id as agent_id,
        AVG(ntc.handle_time_hours) as avg_handle_time_hours
    FROM NonTransferredCases ntc
    JOIN AgentCaseCounts acc ON ntc.final_agent_id = acc.agent_id
    GROUP BY ntc.final_agent_id
)
SELECT 
    agent_id,
    ROUND(avg_handle_time_hours::numeric, 2) as avg_hours
FROM AgentAvgHandleTime
ORDER BY avg_handle_time_hours ASC
LIMIT 10
"}

function.arguments:
{"db_name": "support", "query": "
WITH ClosedCases AS (
  SELECT 
    c.id as case_id,
    TRIM(BOTH '#' FROM c.ownerid) as agent_id,
    c.createddate,
    c.closeddate
  FROM "Case" c
  WHERE c.createddate >= '2023-05-02' 
    AND c.createddate <= '2023-09-02'
    AND TRIM(c.status) = 'Closed'
    AND c.closeddate != 'None'
),
AssignmentCounts AS (
  SELECT 
    ch.caseid__c as case_id,
    COUNT(*) as assignment_count
  FROM casehistory__c ch
  WHERE ch.field__c = 'Owner Assignment'
    AND ch.caseid__c IN (SELECT case_id FROM ClosedCases)
  GROUP BY ch.caseid__c
),
SingleOwnerCases AS (
  SELECT 
    cc.case_id,
    cc.agent_id,
    EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM 
      (TO_TIMESTAMP(cc.closeddate, 'YYYY-MM-DD"T"HH24:MI:SS.USOF') - 
       TO_TIMESTAMP(cc.createddate, 'YYYY-MM-DD"T"HH24:MI:SS.USOF'))
    ) / 3600.0 as handle_hours
  FROM ClosedCases cc
  JOIN AssignmentCounts ac ON cc.case_id = ac.case_id

)
SELECT

  COUNT(*) as case_count,
  AVG(handle_hours) as avg_handle_hours
FROM SingleOwnerCases
WHERE agent_id IS NOT NULL
  AND agent_id != ''
GROUP BY agent_id

ORDER BY avg_handle_hours ASC

"}

function.arguments:
{"db_name": "support", "query": "
-- Main query to find agents who processed 2+ cases (non-transferred) with lowest avg handle time
WITH ClosedCases AS (
  SELECT 
    c.id as case_id,
    TRIM(BOTH '#' FROM c.ownerid) as agent_id,
    c.createddate,
    c.closeddate
  FROM "Case" c
  WHERE c.createddate >= '2023-05-02'
    AND c.createddate <= '2023-09-02'
    AND TRIM(c.status) = 'Closed'
    AND c.closeddate != 'None'
    AND c.closeddate IS NOT NULL
),
OwnerAssignmentCounts AS (
  SELECT 
    ch.caseid__c as case_id,
    COUNT(*) as assignment_count
  FROM casehistory__c ch
  WHERE ch.field__c = 'Owner Assignment'
    AND ch.caseid__c IN (SELECT case_id FROM ClosedCases)
  GROUP BY ch.caseid__c
),
NonTransferredCases AS (
  SELECT 
    cc.case_id,
    cc.agent_id,
    cc.createddate,
    cc.closeddate,
    EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM 
      (TO_TIMESTAMP(cc.closeddate, 'YYYY-MM-DD"T"HH24:MI:SS.USOF') - 
       TO_TIMESTAMP(cc.createddate, 'YYYY-MM-DD"T"HH24:MI:SS.USOF'))
    ) / 3600.0 as handle_time_hours
  FROM ClosedCases cc
  JOIN OwnerAssignmentCounts oac ON cc.case_id = oac.case_id
  WHERE oac.assignment_count = 1
),
AgentStats AS (
  SELECT 
    agent_id,
    COUNT(*) as case_count,
    AVG(handle_time_hours) as avg_handle_time_hours
  FROM NonTransferredCases
  WHERE agent_id IS NOT NULL
    AND agent_id != ''
  GROUP BY agent_id
  HAVING COUNT(*) > 1
)
SELECT agent_id
FROM AgentStats
ORDER BY avg_handle_time_hours ASC
LIMIT 1
"}

function.arguments:
{"db_name": "support", "query": "
-- Normalize all IDs by trimming # from both case and case history
WITH ClosedCases AS (
  SELECT 
    TRIM(BOTH '#' FROM c.id) as case_id,
    TRIM(BOTH '#' FROM c.ownerid) as agent_id,
    c.createddate,
    c.closeddate
  FROM "Case" c
  WHERE c.createddate >= '2023-05-02'
    AND c.createddate <= '2023-09-02'
    AND TRIM(c.status) = 'Closed'
    AND c.closeddate != 'None'
    AND c.closeddate IS NOT NULL
),
AssignmentCounts AS (
  SELECT 
    TRIM(BOTH '#' FROM ch.caseid__c) as case_id,
    COUNT(*) as assignment_count
  FROM casehistory__c ch
  WHERE ch.field__c = 'Owner Assignment'
  GROUP BY TRIM(BOTH '#' FROM ch.caseid__c)
)
SELECT 
  cc.agent_id,
  COUNT(*) as num_cases,
  AVG(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM 
    (TO_TIMESTAMP(cc.closeddate, 'YYYY-MM-DD"T"HH24:MI:SS.USOF') - 
     TO_TIMESTAMP(cc.createddate, 'YYYY-MM-DD"T"HH24:MI:SS.USOF'))
  ) / 3600.0) as avg_hours
FROM ClosedCases cc
JOIN AssignmentCounts ac ON cc.case_id = ac.case_id
WHERE ac.assignment_count = 1
  AND cc.agent_id != ''
GROUP BY cc.agent_id
HAVING COUNT(*) > 1
ORDER BY avg_hours ASC
LIMIT 1
"}

function.arguments:
{"db_name": "support", "query": "
WITH ClosedCases AS (
  SELECT 
    TRIM(BOTH '#' FROM c.id) as case_id,
    TRIM(BOTH '#' FROM c.ownerid) as agent_id,

    c.closeddate

    AND c.createddate <= '2023-09-02'
    AND TRIM(c.status) = 'Closed'
    AND c.closeddate IS NOT NULL
    AND c.closeddate != 'None'
),
CaseAssignments AS (
  SELECT 
    TRIM(BOTH '#' FROM ch.caseid__c) as case_id,
    ch.field__c

)

ORDER BY cc.agent_id
LIMIT 10

function.arguments:
{"db_name": "support", "query": "
WITH ClosedCases AS (
  SELECT 
    TRIM(BOTH '#' FROM c.id) as case_id,
    TRIM(BOTH '#' FROM c.ownerid) as agent_id,
    c.createddate,
    c.closeddate,
    EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM 
      (TO_TIMESTAMP(c.closeddate, 'YYYY-MM-DD"T"HH24:MI:SS.USOF') - 
       TO_TIMESTAMP(c.createddate, 'YYYY-MM-DD"T"HH24:MI:SS.USOF'))
    ) / 3600.0 as handle_hours
  FROM "Case" c
  WHERE c.createddate >= '2023-05-02'
    AND c.createddate <= '2023-09-02'
    AND TRIM(c.status) LIKE 'Closed%'
    AND c.closeddate IS NOT NULL
    AND c.closeddate != 'None'
    AND c.closeddate >= '2023-05-02'
),
AgentStats AS (
  SELECT 
    agent_id,
    COUNT(*) as case_count,
    AVG(handle_hours) as avg_hours
  FROM ClosedCases
  WHERE agent_id != ''
    AND agent_id IS NOT NULL
  GROUP BY agent_id
  HAVING COUNT(*) > 1
)
SELECT agent_id, case_count, ROUND(avg_hours::numeric, 2) as avg_hours
FROM AgentStats  
ORDER BY avg_hours ASC
LIMIT 10
"}

function.arguments:
{"db_name": "support", "query": "
WITH AgentCases AS (
  SELECT 
    TRIM(BOTH '#' FROM c.ownerid) as agent_id,
    c.createddate,
    c.closeddate
  FROM "Case" c
  WHERE TRIM(c.status) LIKE 'Closed%'
    AND c.closeddate IS NOT NULL
    AND c.closeddate != 'None'
    AND c.createddate >= '2023-05-02'
    AND c.createddate <= '2023-09-02'
)
SELECT 
  agent_id,
  COUNT(*) as case_count
FROM AgentCases
WHERE agent_id != ''
GROUP BY agent_id
HAVING COUNT(*) >= 2
"}

QUERY:
In the past four months, which agent had the lowest average handle time for those processing more than one case? Return only the Id of the agent.

## Handle Time Policy
- Definition: The duration taken to close a case. Specifically, it is the time from when a case is opened to when it is closed.
- In the queries that specify 'agents managed/queries x cases' -- this filter applies to both the first agent that the case was first assigned to and the agent that the case was transferred to. This means that if an agent has 2 cases that was initially assigned to itself by admin and 1 case transferred from another agent, a filter like 'handled/managed at least 3 cases' would not filter this agent out.
- When computing handle time, we do not compute handle time for cases that have been transferred to other agents.
- For cases that have NOT been transferred to an other agent, there will be only ONE 'Owner Assignment', and for those that have been transferred, there will be MORE THAN ONE 'Owner Assignment'.

## Today's date: 2023-09-02

DATABASE DESCRIPTION:
You are working with six databases to solve this query.

Here are the descriptions of these six databases:

1. core_crm
   - This database is stored in a SQLite database and contains core CRM data including users, accounts, and contacts from Salesforce CRMArena.
   - This database consists of three tables:
    - User: Sales team information
      - Fields: Id, FirstName, LastName, Email, Phone, Username, Alias, LanguageLocaleKey, EmailEncodingKey, TimeZoneSidKey, LocaleSidKey
    - Account: Company/customer data
      - Fields: Id, Name, Phone, Industry, Description, NumberOfEmployees, ShippingState
    - Contact: Individual contacts
      - Fields: Id, FirstName, LastName, Email, AccountId

2. sales_pipeline
   - This database is stored in a DuckDB database and contains sales pipeline data including opportunities, quotes, contracts, and leads.
   - This database consists of six tables:
     - Contract: Signed contracts
      - Fields: Id, AccountId, Status, StartDate, CustomerSignedDate, CompanySignedDate, Description, ContractTerm
     - Lead: Sales leads
      - Fields: Id, FirstName, LastName, Email, Phone, Company, Status, ConvertedContactId, ConvertedAccountId, Title, CreatedDate, ConvertedDate, IsConverted, OwnerId
     - Opportunity: Sales deals
      - Fields: Id, ContractID__c, AccountId, ContactId, OwnerId, Probability, Amount, StageName, Name, Description, CreatedDate, CloseDate
     - OpportunityLineItem: Deal line items
      - Fields: Id, OpportunityId, Product2Id, PricebookEntryId, Quantity, TotalPrice
     - Quote: Price quotes
      - Fields: Id, OpportunityId, AccountId, ContactId, Name, Description, Status, CreatedDate, ExpirationDate
     - QuoteLineItem: Quote details
      - Fields: Id, QuoteId, OpportunityLineItemId, Product2Id, PricebookEntryId, Quantity, UnitPrice, Discount, TotalPrice

3. support
   - This database is stored in a PostgreSQL database and contains customer support data including cases, knowledge articles, and communications.
   - This database consists of six tables:
     - Case: Support cases
      - Fields: id, priority, subject, description, status, contactid, createddate, closeddate, orderitemid__c, issueid__c, accountid, ownerid
     - knowledge__kav: Knowledge articles
      - Fields: id, title, faq_answer__c, summary, urlname
     - issue__c: Custom issues
      - Fields: id, name, description__c
     - casehistory__c: Case history
      - Fields: id, caseid__c, oldvalue__c, newvalue__c, createddate, field__c
     - emailmessage: Email communications
      - Fields: id, subject, textbody, parentid, fromaddress, toids, messagedate, relatedtoid
     - livechattranscript: Chat logs
      - Fields: id, caseid, accountid, ownerid, body, endtime, livechatvisitorid, contactid

4. products_orders
   - This database is stored in a SQLite database and contains product catalog and order data.
   - This database consists of seven tables:
     - ProductCategory: Product categories
      - Fields: Id, Name, CatalogId
     - Product2: Product catalog
      - Fields: Id, Name, Description, IsActive, External_ID__c
     - ProductCategoryProduct: one of the pricing and mapping tables
      - Fields: Id, ProductCategoryId, ProductId
     - Pricebook2: one of the pricing and mapping tables
      - Fields: Id, Name, Description, IsActive, ValidFrom, ValidTo
     - PricebookEntry: one of the pricing and mapping tables
      - Fields: Id, Pricebook2Id, Product2Id, UnitPrice
     - Order: Customer orders
      - Fields: Id, AccountId, Status, EffectiveDate, Pricebook2Id, OwnerId
     - OrderItem: Order details
      - Fields: Id, OrderId, Product2Id, Quantity, UnitPrice, PriceBookEntryId

5. activities
   - This database is stored in a DuckDB database and contains activity data including tasks, events, and voice call transcripts.
   - This database consists of three tables:
     - Event: Calendar events
      - Fields: Id, WhatId, OwnerId, StartDateTime, Subject, Description, DurationInMinutes, Location, IsAllDayEvent
     - Task: Activities and tasks
      - Fields: Id, WhatId, OwnerId, Priority, Status, ActivityDate, Subject, Description
     - VoiceCallTranscript__c: Call records
      - Fields: Id, OpportunityId__c, LeadId__c, Body__c, CreatedDate, EndTime__c

6. territory
   - This database is stored in a SQLite database and contains sales territory management data.
   - This database consists of two tables:
     - Territory2: Sales territories
      - Fields: Id, Name, Description
     - UserTerritory2Association: Territory assignments
      - Id, UserId, Territory2Id

HINTS: 
- ~25% of ID-like fields may include a leading # (e.g., #001Wt00000PFj4zIAD).
- ~20% of text fields may contain trailing whitespace (e.g., "Company Name ").
- Corruption may appear in: Id, AccountId, ContactId, Name, FirstName, LastName, Email, Subject, Status.
- Corruption handling is needed for reliable joins
- Domain-specific CRM knowledge is required

function.arguments:
{"db_name": "support", "query": "
WITH ClosedCases AS (
    SELECT 
        c.id as case_id, 
        c.ownerid as agent_id, 
        c.createddate, 
        c.closeddate
    FROM "Case" c
    WHERE c.createddate >= '2023-05-02'::timestamp
        AND c.closeddate IS NOT NULL 
        AND c.closeddate != 'None'
        AND c.status = 'Closed'
),
OwnerAssignmentCount AS (
    SELECT 
        ch.caseid__c,
        COUNT(*) as assignment_count
    FROM casehistory__c ch
    WHERE ch.field__c = 'Owner Assignment'
        AND ch.caseid__c IN (SELECT case_id FROM ClosedCases)
    GROUP BY ch.caseid__c
),
NonTransferredCases AS (
    SELECT 
        cc.case_id,
        cc.agent_id,
        cc.createddate,
        cc.closeddate,
        EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (cc.closeddate - cc.createddate))/3600.0 as handle_time_hours
    FROM ClosedCases cc
    JOIN OwnerAssignmentCount oac ON cc.case_id = oac.caseid__c
    WHERE oac.assignment_count = 1
)
SELECT 
    agent_id,
    COUNT(*) as case_count,
    AVG(handle_time_hours) as avg_handle_time_hours
FROM NonTransferredCases
WHERE agent_id IS NOT NULL
    AND agent_id != ''
    AND agent_id != 'None'
GROUP BY agent_id
HAVING COUNT(*) > 1
ORDER BY avg_handle_time_hours ASC
LIMIT 10
"}

        AND TRIM(c.status) = 'Closed'
)
SELECT COUNT(*) as total_closed_cases
FROM ClosedCases
"}

function.arguments:
{"db_name": "support", "query": "
WITH ClosedCases AS (
    SELECT 
        c.id as case_id,
        TRIM(c.ownerid, '#') as agent_id,
        c.createddate,
        c.closeddate
    FROM "Case" c
    WHERE c.createddate >= '2023-05-02'
        AND c.closeddate IS NOT NULL 
        AND c.closeddate != 'None'
        AND TRIM(c.status) = 'Closed'
        AND c.ownerid IS NOT NULL
        AND TRIM(c.ownerid, '#') != ''
        AND TRIM(c.ownerid, '#') != 'None'
),
OwnerAssignmentCount AS (
    SELECT 
        ch.caseid__c,
        COUNT(*) as assignment_count
    FROM casehistory__c ch
    WHERE ch.field__c = 'Owner Assignment'
        AND ch.caseid__c IN (SELECT case_id FROM ClosedCases)
    GROUP BY ch.caseid__c
)
SELECT 
    cc.agent_id,
    COUNT(*) as case_count,
    AVG(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM 
        (TO_TIMESTAMP(cc.closeddate, 'YYYY-MM-DD"T"HH24:MI:SS.USOF') - 
         TO_TIMESTAMP(cc.createddate, 'YYYY-MM-DD"T"HH24:MI:SS.USOF')))/3600.0
    ) as avg_handle_time_hours
FROM ClosedCases cc
JOIN OwnerAssignmentCount oac ON cc.case_id = oac.caseid__c
WHERE oac.assignment_count = 1
GROUP BY cc.agent_id
HAVING COUNT(*) > 1
ORDER BY avg_handle_time_hours ASC
LIMIT 1
"}

function.arguments:
{"db_name": "support", "query": "
WITH ClosedCases AS (
    SELECT 
        c.id as case_id,
        TRIM(BOTH '#' FROM c.ownerid) as agent_id,
        c.createddate,
        c.closeddate
    FROM "Case" c
    WHERE c.createddate >= '2023-05-02'
        AND c.closeddate IS NOT NULL 
        AND c.closeddate != 'None'
        AND TRIM(c.status) = 'Closed'
),
OwnerAssignmentCount AS (
    SELECT 
        ch.caseid__c,
        COUNT(*) as assignment_count
    FROM casehistory__c ch
    WHERE ch.field__c = 'Owner Assignment'
        AND ch.caseid__c IN (SELECT case_id FROM ClosedCases)
    GROUP BY ch.caseid__c
),
NonTransferredCases AS (
    SELECT 
        cc.case_id,
        cc.agent_id,
        cc.createddate,
        cc.closeddate
    FROM ClosedCases cc
    JOIN OwnerAssignmentCount oac ON cc.case_id = oac.caseid__c
    WHERE oac.assignment_count = 1
),
AgentStats AS (
    SELECT 
        agent_id,
        COUNT(*) as case_count
    FROM NonTransferredCases
    WHERE agent_id IS NOT NULL
        AND agent_id != 'None'
    GROUP BY agent_id
    HAVING COUNT(*) >= 2
)
SELECT 
    asts.agent_id,
    asts.case_count,
    ROUND(AVG(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM 
        (TO_TIMESTAMP(ntc.closeddate, 'YYYY-MM-DD"T"HH24:MI:SS.USOF') - 
         TO_TIMESTAMP(ntc.createddate, 'YYYY-MM-DD"T"HH24:MI:SS.USOF')))/3600.0
    ), 2) as avg_handle_time_hours
FROM NonTransferredCases ntc
JOIN AgentStats asts ON ntc.agent_id = asts.agent_id
GROUP BY asts.agent_id, asts.case_count
ORDER BY avg_handle_time_hours ASC
LIMIT 5
"}

function.arguments:
{"db_name": "support", "query": "
-- Just get all closed cases in the past 4 months and count them
SELECT 
    c.id as case_id,
    TRIM(BOTH '#' FROM c.ownerid) as agent_id,
    c.status,
    CASE 
        WHEN c.closeddate != 'None' AND c.closeddate IS NOT NULL THEN 'has_closed'
        ELSE 'no_closed'
    END as closed_status_check
FROM "Case" c
WHERE c.createddate >= '2023-05-02'
    AND c.createddate <= '2023-09-02'
    AND c.closeddate IS NOT NULL 
    AND c.closeddate != 'None'
LIMIT 20
"}

function.arguments:
{"db_name": "support", "query": "
WITH ClosedCases AS (
    SELECT 
        c.id as case_id,
        TRIM(BOTH '#' FROM c.ownerid) as agent_id,
        c.createddate,
        c.closeddate
    FROM "Case" c
    WHERE c.createddate >= '2023-05-02'
        AND c.createddate <= '2023-09-02'
        AND c.closeddate IS NOT NULL 
        AND c.closeddate != 'None'
        AND TRIM(c.status) = 'Closed'
        AND c.ownerid IS NOT NULL
        AND TRIM(BOTH '#' FROM c.ownerid) != ''
        AND TRIM(BOTH '#' FROM c.ownerid) != 'None'
),
OwnerAssignmentCount AS (
    SELECT 
        ch.caseid__c,
        COUNT(*) as assignment_count
    FROM casehistory__c ch
    WHERE ch.field__c = 'Owner Assignment'
        AND ch.caseid__c IN (SELECT case_id FROM ClosedCases)
    GROUP BY ch.caseid__c
),
NonTransferredCases AS (
    SELECT 
        cc.case_id,
        cc.agent_id,
        cc.createddate,
        cc.closeddate,
        EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM 
            (TO_TIMESTAMP(cc.closeddate, 'YYYY-MM-DD"T"HH24:MI:SS.USOF') - 
             TO_TIMESTAMP(cc.createddate, 'YYYY-MM-DD"T"HH24:MI:SS.USOF'))
        ) / 3600.0 as handle_time_hours
    FROM ClosedCases cc
    JOIN OwnerAssignmentCount oac ON cc.case_id = oac.caseid__c
    WHERE oac.assignment_count = 1
),
AgentStats AS (
    SELECT 
        agent_id,
        COUNT(*) as case_count,
        AVG(handle_time_hours) as avg_handle_time_hours
    FROM NonTransferredCases
    WHERE agent_id IS NOT NULL
    GROUP BY agent_id
    HAVING COUNT(*) > 1
)
SELECT agent_id
FROM AgentStats
ORDER BY avg_handle_time_hours ASC
LIMIT 1
"}

function.arguments:
{"db_name": "support", "query": "
WITH ClosedCases AS (
    SELECT 
        c.id as case_id,
        TRIM(BOTH '#' FROM c.ownerid) as final_agent_id,
        c.createddate,
        c.closeddate
    FROM "Case" c
    WHERE c.createddate >= '2023-05-02'
        AND c.createddate <= '2023-09-02'
        AND TRIM(c.status) = 'Closed'
        AND c.closeddate IS NOT NULL
        AND c.closeddate != 'None'
),
CaseAssignmentCounts AS (
    SELECT 
        ch.caseid__c as case_id,
        COUNT(*) as assignment_count,
        MAX(ch.newvalue__c) as final_owner_from_history
    FROM casehistory__c ch
    WHERE ch.field__c = 'Owner Assignment'
        AND ch.caseid__c IN (SELECT case_id FROM ClosedCases)
    GROUP BY ch.caseid__c
),
NonTransferredCases AS (
    SELECT 
        cc.case_id,
        cc.final_agent_id,
        cc.createddate,
        cc.closeddate,
        EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM 
            (TO_TIMESTAMP(cc.closeddate, 'YYYY-MM-DD"T"HH24:MI:SS.USOF') - 
             TO_TIMESTAMP(cc.createddate, 'YYYY-MM-DD"T"HH24:MI:SS.USOF'))
        ) / 3600.0 as handle_time_hours
    FROM ClosedCases cc
    JOIN CaseAssignmentCounts cac ON cc.case_id = cac.case_id
    WHERE cac.assignment_count = 1
),
AgentCaseCounts AS (
    SELECT 
        final_agent_id as agent_id,
        COUNT(*) as case_count
    FROM NonTransferredCases
    WHERE final_agent_id IS NOT NULL
        AND final_agent_id != 'None'
    GROUP BY final_agent_id
    HAVING COUNT(*) > 1
),
AgentAvgHandleTime AS (
    SELECT 
        ntc.final_agent_id as agent_id,
        AVG(ntc.handle_time_hours) as avg_handle_time_hours
    FROM NonTransferredCases ntc
    JOIN AgentCaseCounts acc ON ntc.final_agent_id = acc.agent_id
    GROUP BY ntc.final_agent_id
)
SELECT 
    agent_id,
    ROUND(avg_handle_time_hours::numeric, 2) as avg_hours
FROM AgentAvgHandleTime
ORDER BY avg_handle_time_hours ASC
LIMIT 10
"}

function.arguments:
{"db_name": "support", "query": "
SELECT TRIM(BOTH '#' FROM c.ownerid) as agent_id,
       COUNT(*) as total_cases,
       MIN(c.createddate) as earliest,
       MAX(c.createddate) as latest
FROM "Case" c
WHERE c.createddate >= '2023-05-02'
  AND c.createddate <= '2023-09-02'
  AND TRIM(c.status) = 'Closed'
  AND c.closeddate != 'None'
GROUP BY TRIM(BOTH '#' FROM c.ownerid)
HAVING COUNT(*) > 1
ORDER BY total_cases DESC
LIMIT 20
"}

function.arguments:
{"db_name": "support", "query": "
WITH ClosedCases AS (
  SELECT 
    c.id as case_id,
    TRIM(BOTH '#' FROM c.ownerid) as agent_id,
    c.createddate,
    c.closeddate
  FROM "Case" c
  WHERE c.createddate >= '2023-05-02' 
    AND c.createddate <= '2023-09-02'
    AND TRIM(c.status) = 'Closed'
    AND c.closeddate != 'None'
),
AssignmentCounts AS (
  SELECT 
    ch.caseid__c as case_id,
    COUNT(*) as assignment_count
  FROM casehistory__c ch
  WHERE ch.field__c = 'Owner Assignment'
    AND ch.caseid__c IN (SELECT case_id FROM ClosedCases)
  GROUP BY ch.caseid__c
),
SingleOwnerCases AS (
  SELECT 
    cc.case_id,
    cc.agent_id,
    EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM 
      (TO_TIMESTAMP(cc.closeddate, 'YYYY-MM-DD"T"HH24:MI:SS.USOF') - 
       TO_TIMESTAMP(cc.createddate, 'YYYY-MM-DD"T"HH24:MI:SS.USOF'))
    ) / 3600.0 as handle_hours
  FROM ClosedCases cc
  JOIN AssignmentCounts ac ON cc.case_id = ac.case_id
  WHERE ac.assignment_count = 1
)
SELECT 
  agent_id,
  COUNT(*) as case_count,
  AVG(handle_hours) as avg_handle_hours
FROM SingleOwnerCases
WHERE agent_id IS NOT NULL
  AND agent_id != ''
GROUP BY agent_id
HAVING COUNT(*) > 1
ORDER BY avg_handle_hours ASC
LIMIT 5
"}

WITH ClosedCases AS (
  SELECT c.id as case_id, TRIM(BOTH '#' FROM c.ownerid) as agent_id
  FROM "Case" c
  WHERE c.createddate >= '2023-05-02' 
    AND c.createddate <= '2023-09-02'

    AND c.closeddate != 'None'
)
SELECT 
  cc.case_id as closed_case_id,
  ch.caseid__c as history_case_id,
  ch.field__c,
  ch.createddate as history_date
FROM ClosedCases cc

WHERE ch.field__c = 'Owner Assignment'
LIMIT 20
"}

  AND TRIM(c.status) = 'Closed'
  AND c.closeddate != 'None'
  AND c.closeddate IS NOT NULL

function.arguments:
{"db_name": "support", "query": "
-- Main query to find agents who processed 2+ cases (non-transferred) with lowest avg handle time
WITH ClosedCases AS (
  SELECT 
    c.id as case_id,
    TRIM(BOTH '#' FROM c.ownerid) as agent_id,
    c.createddate,
    c.closeddate
  FROM "Case" c
  WHERE c.createddate >= '2023-05-02'
    AND c.createddate <= '2023-09-02'
    AND TRIM(c.status) = 'Closed'
    AND c.closeddate != 'None'
    AND c.closeddate IS NOT NULL
),
OwnerAssignmentCounts AS (
  SELECT 
    ch.caseid__c as case_id,
    COUNT(*) as assignment_count
  FROM casehistory__c ch
  WHERE ch.field__c = 'Owner Assignment'
    AND ch.caseid__c IN (SELECT case_id FROM ClosedCases)
  GROUP BY ch.caseid__c
),
NonTransferredCases AS (
  SELECT 
    cc.case_id,
    cc.agent_id,
    cc.createddate,
    cc.closeddate,
    EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM 
      (TO_TIMESTAMP(cc.closeddate, 'YYYY-MM-DD"T"HH24:MI:SS.USOF') - 
       TO_TIMESTAMP(cc.createddate, 'YYYY-MM-DD"T"HH24:MI:SS.USOF'))
    ) / 3600.0 as handle_time_hours
  FROM ClosedCases cc
  JOIN OwnerAssignmentCounts oac ON cc.case_id = oac.case_id
  WHERE oac.assignment_count = 1
),
AgentStats AS (
  SELECT 
    agent_id,
    COUNT(*) as case_count,
    AVG(handle_time_hours) as avg_handle_time_hours
  FROM NonTransferredCases
  WHERE agent_id IS NOT NULL
    AND agent_id != ''
  GROUP BY agent_id
  HAVING COUNT(*) > 1
)
SELECT agent_id
FROM AgentStats
ORDER BY avg_handle_time_hours ASC
LIMIT 1
"}

function.arguments:
{"db_name": "support", "query": "
-- Normalize all IDs by trimming # from both case and case history
WITH ClosedCases AS (
  SELECT 
    TRIM(BOTH '#' FROM c.id) as case_id,
    TRIM(BOTH '#' FROM c.ownerid) as agent_id,
    c.createddate,
    c.closeddate
  FROM "Case" c
  WHERE c.createddate >= '2023-05-02'
    AND c.createddate <= '2023-09-02'
    AND TRIM(c.status) = 'Closed'
    AND c.closeddate != 'None'
    AND c.closeddate IS NOT NULL
),
AssignmentCounts AS (
  SELECT 
    TRIM(BOTH '#' FROM ch.caseid__c) as case_id,
    COUNT(*) as assignment_count
  FROM casehistory__c ch
  WHERE ch.field__c = 'Owner Assignment'
  GROUP BY TRIM(BOTH '#' FROM ch.caseid__c)
)
SELECT 
  cc.agent_id,
  COUNT(*) as num_cases,
  AVG(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM 
    (TO_TIMESTAMP(cc.closeddate, 'YYYY-MM-DD"T"HH24:MI:SS.USOF') - 
     TO_TIMESTAMP(cc.createddate, 'YYYY-MM-DD"T"HH24:MI:SS.USOF'))
  ) / 3600.0) as avg_hours
FROM ClosedCases cc
JOIN AssignmentCounts ac ON cc.case_id = ac.case_id
WHERE ac.assignment_count = 1
  AND cc.agent_id != ''
GROUP BY cc.agent_id
HAVING COUNT(*) > 1
ORDER BY avg_hours ASC
LIMIT 1
"}

function.arguments:
{"db_name": "support", "query": "
WITH ClosedCases AS (
  SELECT 
    TRIM(BOTH '#' FROM c.id) as case_id,
    TRIM(BOTH '#' FROM c.ownerid) as agent_id,
    c.createddate,
    c.closeddate
  FROM "Case" c
  WHERE c.createddate >= '2023-05-02'
    AND c.createddate <= '2023-09-02'
    AND TRIM(c.status) = 'Closed'
    AND c.closeddate IS NOT NULL
    AND c.closeddate != 'None'
),
CaseAssignments AS (
  SELECT 
    TRIM(BOTH '#' FROM ch.caseid__c) as case_id,
    ch.field__c
  FROM casehistory__c ch
  WHERE ch.field__c = 'Owner Assignment'
)
SELECT 
  cc.agent_id,
  COUNT(DISTINCT cc.case_id) as case_count,
  COUNT(DISTINCT ca.case_id) as assignment_count
FROM ClosedCases cc
LEFT JOIN CaseAssignments ca ON cc.case_id = ca.case_id
GROUP BY cc.agent_id
HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT cc.case_id) > 1
ORDER BY cc.agent_id
LIMIT 10
"}

QUERY:
In the past four months, which agent had the lowest average handle time for those processing more than one case? Return only the Id of the agent.

## Handle Time Policy
- Definition: The duration taken to close a case. Specifically, it is the time from when a case is opened to when it is closed.
- In the queries that specify 'agents managed/queries x cases' -- this filter applies to both the first agent that the case was first assigned to and the agent that the case was transferred to. This means that if an agent has 2 cases that was initially assigned to itself by admin and 1 case transferred from another agent, a filter like 'handled/managed at least 3 cases' would not filter this agent out.
- When computing handle time, we do not compute handle time for cases that have been transferred to other agents.
- For cases that have NOT been transferred to an other agent, there will be only ONE 'Owner Assignment', and for those that have been transferred, there will be MORE THAN ONE 'Owner Assignment'.

## Today's date: 2023-09-02

DATABASE DESCRIPTION:
You are working with six databases to solve this query.

Here are the descriptions of these six databases:

1. core_crm
   - This database is stored in a SQLite database and contains core CRM data including users, accounts, and contacts from Salesforce CRMArena.
   - This database consists of three tables:
    - User: Sales team information
      - Fields: Id, FirstName, LastName, Email, Phone, Username, Alias, LanguageLocaleKey, EmailEncodingKey, TimeZoneSidKey, LocaleSidKey
    - Account: Company/customer data
      - Fields: Id, Name, Phone, Industry, Description, NumberOfEmployees, ShippingState
    - Contact: Individual contacts
      - Fields: Id, FirstName, LastName, Email, AccountId

2. sales_pipeline
   - This database is stored in a DuckDB database and contains sales pipeline data including opportunities, quotes, contracts, and leads.
   - This database consists of six tables:
     - Contract: Signed contracts
      - Fields: Id, AccountId, Status, StartDate, CustomerSignedDate, CompanySignedDate, Description, ContractTerm
     - Lead: Sales leads
      - Fields: Id, FirstName, LastName, Email, Phone, Company, Status, ConvertedContactId, ConvertedAccountId, Title, CreatedDate, ConvertedDate, IsConverted, OwnerId
     - Opportunity: Sales deals
      - Fields: Id, ContractID__c, AccountId, ContactId, OwnerId, Probability, Amount, StageName, Name, Description, CreatedDate, CloseDate
     - OpportunityLineItem: Deal line items
      - Fields: Id, OpportunityId, Product2Id, PricebookEntryId, Quantity, TotalPrice
     - Quote: Price quotes
      - Fields: Id, OpportunityId, AccountId, ContactId, Name, Description, Status, CreatedDate, ExpirationDate
     - QuoteLineItem: Quote details
      - Fields: Id, QuoteId, OpportunityLineItemId, Product2Id, PricebookEntryId, Quantity, UnitPrice, Discount, TotalPrice

3. support
   - This database is stored in a PostgreSQL database and contains customer support data including cases, knowledge articles, and communications.
   - This database consists of six tables:
     - Case: Support cases
      - Fields: id, priority, subject, description, status, contactid, createddate, closeddate, orderitemid__c, issueid__c, accountid, ownerid
     - knowledge__kav: Knowledge articles
      - Fields: id, title, faq_answer__c, summary, urlname
     - issue__c: Custom issues
      - Fields: id, name, description__c
     - casehistory__c: Case history
      - Fields: id, caseid__c, oldvalue__c, newvalue__c, createddate, field__c
     - emailmessage: Email communications
      - Fields: id, subject, textbody, parentid, fromaddress, toids, messagedate, relatedtoid
     - livechattranscript: Chat logs
      - Fields: id, caseid, accountid, ownerid, body, endtime, livechatvisitorid, contactid

4. products_orders
   - This database is stored in a SQLite database and contains product catalog and order data.
   - This database consists of seven tables:
     - ProductCategory: Product categories
      - Fields: Id, Name, CatalogId
     - Product2: Product catalog
      - Fields: Id, Name, Description, IsActive, External_ID__c
     - ProductCategoryProduct: one of the pricing and mapping tables
      - Fields: Id, ProductCategoryId, ProductId
     - Pricebook2: one of the pricing and mapping tables
      - Fields: Id, Name, Description, IsActive, ValidFrom, ValidTo
     - PricebookEntry: one of the pricing and mapping tables
      - Fields: Id, Pricebook2Id, Product2Id, UnitPrice
     - Order: Customer orders
      - Fields: Id, AccountId, Status, EffectiveDate, Pricebook2Id, OwnerId
     - OrderItem: Order details
      - Fields: Id, OrderId, Product2Id, Quantity, UnitPrice, PriceBookEntryId

5. activities
   - This database is stored in a DuckDB database and contains activity data including tasks, events, and voice call transcripts.
   - This database consists of three tables:
     - Event: Calendar events
      - Fields: Id, WhatId, OwnerId, StartDateTime, Subject, Description, DurationInMinutes, Location, IsAllDayEvent
     - Task: Activities and tasks
      - Fields: Id, WhatId, OwnerId, Priority, Status, ActivityDate, Subject, Description
     - VoiceCallTranscript__c: Call records
      - Fields: Id, OpportunityId__c, LeadId__c, Body__c, CreatedDate, EndTime__c

6. territory
   - This database is stored in a SQLite database and contains sales territory management data.
   - This database consists of two tables:
     - Territory2: Sales territories
      - Fields: Id, Name, Description
     - UserTerritory2Association: Territory assignments
      - Id, UserId, Territory2Id

HINTS: 
- ~25% of ID-like fields may include a leading # (e.g., #001Wt00000PFj4zIAD).
- ~20% of text fields may contain trailing whitespace (e.g., "Company Name ").
- Corruption may appear in: Id, AccountId, ContactId, Name, FirstName, LastName, Email, Subject, Status.
- Corruption handling is needed for reliable joins
- Domain-specific CRM knowledge is required

function.arguments:
{"db_name": "support", "query": "
WITH ClosedCases AS (
    SELECT 
        c.id as case_id, 
        c.ownerid as agent_id, 
        c.createddate, 
        c.closeddate
    FROM "Case" c
    WHERE c.createddate >= '2023-05-02'::timestamp
        AND c.closeddate IS NOT NULL 
        AND c.closeddate != 'None'
        AND c.status = 'Closed'
),
OwnerAssignmentCount AS (
    SELECT 
        ch.caseid__c,
        COUNT(*) as assignment_count
    FROM casehistory__c ch
    WHERE ch.field__c = 'Owner Assignment'
        AND ch.caseid__c IN (SELECT case_id FROM ClosedCases)
    GROUP BY ch.caseid__c
),
NonTransferredCases AS (
    SELECT 
        cc.case_id,
        cc.agent_id,
        cc.createddate,
        cc.closeddate,
        EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (cc.closeddate - cc.createddate))/3600.0 as handle_time_hours
    FROM ClosedCases cc
    JOIN OwnerAssignmentCount oac ON cc.case_id = oac.caseid__c
    WHERE oac.assignment_count = 1
)
SELECT 
    agent_id,
    COUNT(*) as case_count,
    AVG(handle_time_hours) as avg_handle_time_hours
FROM NonTransferredCases
WHERE agent_id IS NOT NULL
    AND agent_id != ''
    AND agent_id != 'None'
GROUP BY agent_id
HAVING COUNT(*) > 1
ORDER BY avg_handle_time_hours ASC
LIMIT 10
"}

function.arguments:
{"db_name": "support", "query": "
WITH ClosedCases AS (
    SELECT 
        c.id as case_id, 
        c.ownerid as agent_id, 
        c.createddate, 
        c.closeddate
    FROM "Case" c
    WHERE c.createddate >= '2023-05-02'
        AND c.closeddate IS NOT NULL 
        AND c.closeddate != 'None'
        AND (c.status = 'Closed' OR c.status LIKE 'Closed%')
),
OwnerAssignmentCount AS (
    SELECT 
        ch.caseid__c,
        COUNT(*) as assignment_count
    FROM casehistory__c ch
    WHERE ch.field__c = 'Owner Assignment'
        AND ch.caseid__c IN (SELECT case_id FROM ClosedCases)
    GROUP BY ch.caseid__c
),
NonTransferredCases AS (
    SELECT 
        cc.case_id,
        cc.agent_id,
        cc.createddate,
        cc.closeddate,
        EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (TO_TIMESTAMP(cc.closeddate, 'YYYY-MM-DD"T"HH24:MI:SS.USOF') - 
                           TO_TIMESTAMP(cc.createddate, 'YYYY-MM-DD"T"HH24:MI:SS.USOF')))/3600.0 as handle_time_hours
    FROM ClosedCases cc
    JOIN OwnerAssignmentCount oac ON cc.case_id = oac.caseid__c
    WHERE oac.assignment_count = 1
)
SELECT 
    agent_id,
    COUNT(*) as case_count,
    AVG(handle_time_hours) as avg_handle_time_hours
FROM NonTransferredCases
WHERE agent_id IS NOT NULL
    AND agent_id != ''
    AND agent_id != 'None'
    AND agent_id NOT LIKE '#%'
GROUP BY agent_id
HAVING COUNT(*) > 1
ORDER BY avg_handle_time_hours ASC
LIMIT 1
"}

FROM "Case" c

    AND c.closeddate IS NOT NULL 
    AND c.closeddate != 'None'

function.arguments:
{"db_name": "support", "query": "
WITH ClosedCases AS (
    SELECT 
        c.id as case_id,
        TRIM(c.ownerid, '#') as agent_id,
        c.createddate,
        c.closeddate
    FROM "Case" c
    WHERE c.createddate >= '2023-05-02'
        AND c.closeddate IS NOT NULL 
        AND c.closeddate != 'None'
        AND TRIM(c.status) = 'Closed'
        AND c.ownerid IS NOT NULL
        AND TRIM(c.ownerid, '#') != ''
        AND TRIM(c.ownerid, '#') != 'None'
),
OwnerAssignmentCount AS (
    SELECT 
        ch.caseid__c,
        COUNT(*) as assignment_count
    FROM casehistory__c ch
    WHERE ch.field__c = 'Owner Assignment'
        AND ch.caseid__c IN (SELECT case_id FROM ClosedCases)
    GROUP BY ch.caseid__c
)
SELECT 
    cc.agent_id,
    COUNT(*) as case_count,
    AVG(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM 
        (TO_TIMESTAMP(cc.closeddate, 'YYYY-MM-DD"T"HH24:MI:SS.USOF') - 
         TO_TIMESTAMP(cc.createddate, 'YYYY-MM-DD"T"HH24:MI:SS.USOF')))/3600.0
    ) as avg_handle_time_hours
FROM ClosedCases cc
JOIN OwnerAssignmentCount oac ON cc.case_id = oac.caseid__c
WHERE oac.assignment_count = 1
GROUP BY cc.agent_id
HAVING COUNT(*) > 1
ORDER BY avg_handle_time_hours ASC
LIMIT 1
"}

function.arguments:
{"db_name": "support", "query": "
WITH ClosedCases AS (
    SELECT 
        c.id as case_id,
        TRIM(BOTH '#' FROM c.ownerid) as agent_id,
        c.createddate,
        c.closeddate
    FROM "Case" c
    WHERE c.createddate >= '2023-05-02'
        AND c.closeddate IS NOT NULL 
        AND c.closeddate != 'None'
        AND TRIM(c.status) = 'Closed'
),
OwnerAssignmentCount AS (
    SELECT 
        ch.caseid__c,
        COUNT(*) as assignment_count
    FROM casehistory__c ch
    WHERE ch.field__c = 'Owner Assignment'
        AND ch.caseid__c IN (SELECT case_id FROM ClosedCases)
    GROUP BY ch.caseid__c
),
NonTransferredCases AS (
    SELECT 
        cc.case_id,
        cc.agent_id,
        cc.createddate,
        cc.closeddate
    FROM ClosedCases cc
    JOIN OwnerAssignmentCount oac ON cc.case_id = oac.caseid__c
    WHERE oac.assignment_count = 1
),
AgentStats AS (
    SELECT 
        agent_id,
        COUNT(*) as case_count
    FROM NonTransferredCases
    WHERE agent_id IS NOT NULL
        AND agent_id != 'None'
    GROUP BY agent_id
    HAVING COUNT(*) >= 2
)
SELECT 
    asts.agent_id,
    asts.case_count,
    ROUND(AVG(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM 
        (TO_TIMESTAMP(ntc.closeddate, 'YYYY-MM-DD"T"HH24:MI:SS.USOF') - 
         TO_TIMESTAMP(ntc.createddate, 'YYYY-MM-DD"T"HH24:MI:SS.USOF')))/3600.0
    ), 2) as avg_handle_time_hours
FROM NonTransferredCases ntc
JOIN AgentStats asts ON ntc.agent_id = asts.agent_id
GROUP BY asts.agent_id, asts.case_count
ORDER BY avg_handle_time_hours ASC
LIMIT 5
"}

function.arguments:
{"db_name": "support", "query": "
-- Just get all closed cases in the past 4 months and count them
SELECT 
    c.id as case_id,
    TRIM(BOTH '#' FROM c.ownerid) as agent_id,
    c.status,
    CASE 
        WHEN c.closeddate != 'None' AND c.closeddate IS NOT NULL THEN 'has_closed'
        ELSE 'no_closed'
    END as closed_status_check
FROM "Case" c
WHERE c.createddate >= '2023-05-02'
    AND c.createddate <= '2023-09-02'
    AND c.closeddate IS NOT NULL 
    AND c.closeddate != 'None'
LIMIT 20
"}

function.arguments:
{"db_name": "support", "query": "
WITH ClosedCases AS (
    SELECT 
        c.id as case_id,
        TRIM(BOTH '#' FROM c.ownerid) as agent_id,
        c.createddate,
        c.closeddate
    FROM "Case" c
    WHERE c.createddate >= '2023-05-02'
        AND c.createddate <= '2023-09-02'
        AND c.closeddate IS NOT NULL 
        AND c.closeddate != 'None'
        AND TRIM(c.status) = 'Closed'
        AND c.ownerid IS NOT NULL
        AND TRIM(BOTH '#' FROM c.ownerid) != ''
        AND TRIM(BOTH '#' FROM c.ownerid) != 'None'
),
OwnerAssignmentCount AS (
    SELECT 
        ch.caseid__c,
        COUNT(*) as assignment_count
    FROM casehistory__c ch
    WHERE ch.field__c = 'Owner Assignment'
        AND ch.caseid__c IN (SELECT case_id FROM ClosedCases)
    GROUP BY ch.caseid__c
),
NonTransferredCases AS (
    SELECT 
        cc.case_id,
        cc.agent_id,
        cc.createddate,
        cc.closeddate,
        EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM 
            (TO_TIMESTAMP(cc.closeddate, 'YYYY-MM-DD"T"HH24:MI:SS.USOF') - 
             TO_TIMESTAMP(cc.createddate, 'YYYY-MM-DD"T"HH24:MI:SS.USOF'))
        ) / 3600.0 as handle_time_hours
    FROM ClosedCases cc
    JOIN OwnerAssignmentCount oac ON cc.case_id = oac.caseid__c
    WHERE oac.assignment_count = 1
),
AgentStats AS (
    SELECT 
        agent_id,
        COUNT(*) as case_count,
        AVG(handle_time_hours) as avg_handle_time_hours
    FROM NonTransferredCases
    WHERE agent_id IS NOT NULL
    GROUP BY agent_id
    HAVING COUNT(*) > 1
)
SELECT agent_id
FROM AgentStats
ORDER BY avg_handle_time_hours ASC
LIMIT 1
"}

-- Check data quality
SELECT 
    c.id,
    c.createddate,
    c.closeddate,
    TRIM(BOTH '#' FROM c.ownerid) as agent_id,
    c.status
FROM "Case" c
WHERE c.status IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY c.createddate DESC
LIMIT 10
"}

function.arguments:
{"db_name": "support", "query": "
WITH ClosedCases AS (
    SELECT 
        c.id as case_id,
        TRIM(BOTH '#' FROM c.ownerid) as final_agent_id,
        c.createddate,
        c.closeddate
    FROM "Case" c
    WHERE c.createddate >= '2023-05-02'
        AND c.createddate <= '2023-09-02'
        AND TRIM(c.status) = 'Closed'
        AND c.closeddate IS NOT NULL
        AND c.closeddate != 'None'
),
CaseAssignmentCounts AS (
    SELECT 
        ch.caseid__c as case_id,
        COUNT(*) as assignment_count,
        MAX(ch.newvalue__c) as final_owner_from_history
    FROM casehistory__c ch
    WHERE ch.field__c = 'Owner Assignment'
        AND ch.caseid__c IN (SELECT case_id FROM ClosedCases)
    GROUP BY ch.caseid__c
),
NonTransferredCases AS (
    SELECT 
        cc.case_id,
        cc.final_agent_id,
        cc.createddate,
        cc.closeddate,
        EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM 
            (TO_TIMESTAMP(cc.closeddate, 'YYYY-MM-DD"T"HH24:MI:SS.USOF') - 
             TO_TIMESTAMP(cc.createddate, 'YYYY-MM-DD"T"HH24:MI:SS.USOF'))
        ) / 3600.0 as handle_time_hours
    FROM ClosedCases cc
    JOIN CaseAssignmentCounts cac ON cc.case_id = cac.case_id
    WHERE cac.assignment_count = 1
),
AgentCaseCounts AS (
    SELECT 
        final_agent_id as agent_id,
        COUNT(*) as case_count
    FROM NonTransferredCases
    WHERE final_agent_id IS NOT NULL
        AND final_agent_id != 'None'
    GROUP BY final_agent_id
    HAVING COUNT(*) > 1
),
AgentAvgHandleTime AS (
    SELECT 
        ntc.final_agent_id as agent_id,
        AVG(ntc.handle_time_hours) as avg_handle_time_hours
    FROM NonTransferredCases ntc
    JOIN AgentCaseCounts acc ON ntc.final_agent_id = acc.agent_id
    GROUP BY ntc.final_agent_id
)
SELECT 
    agent_id,
    ROUND(avg_handle_time_hours::numeric, 2) as avg_hours
FROM AgentAvgHandleTime
ORDER BY avg_handle_time_hours ASC
LIMIT 10
"}

function.arguments:
{"db_name": "support", "query": "
WITH ClosedCases AS (
  SELECT 
    c.id as case_id,
    TRIM(BOTH '#' FROM c.ownerid) as agent_id,
    c.createddate,
    c.closeddate
  FROM "Case" c
  WHERE c.createddate >= '2023-05-02' 
    AND c.createddate <= '2023-09-02'
    AND TRIM(c.status) = 'Closed'
    AND c.closeddate != 'None'
),
AssignmentCounts AS (
  SELECT 
    ch.caseid__c as case_id,
    COUNT(*) as assignment_count
  FROM casehistory__c ch
  WHERE ch.field__c = 'Owner Assignment'
    AND ch.caseid__c IN (SELECT case_id FROM ClosedCases)
  GROUP BY ch.caseid__c
),
SingleOwnerCases AS (
  SELECT 
    cc.case_id,
    cc.agent_id,
    EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM 
      (TO_TIMESTAMP(cc.closeddate, 'YYYY-MM-DD"T"HH24:MI:SS.USOF') - 
       TO_TIMESTAMP(cc.createddate, 'YYYY-MM-DD"T"HH24:MI:SS.USOF'))
    ) / 3600.0 as handle_hours
  FROM ClosedCases cc
  JOIN AssignmentCounts ac ON cc.case_id = ac.case_id
  WHERE ac.assignment_count = 1
)
SELECT 
  agent_id,
  COUNT(*) as case_count,
  AVG(handle_hours) as avg_handle_hours
FROM SingleOwnerCases
WHERE agent_id IS NOT NULL
  AND agent_id != ''
GROUP BY agent_id
HAVING COUNT(*) > 1
ORDER BY avg_handle_hours ASC
LIMIT 5
"}

function.arguments:
{"db_name": "support", "query": "
-- Main query to find agents who processed 2+ cases (non-transferred) with lowest avg handle time
WITH ClosedCases AS (
  SELECT 
    c.id as case_id,
    TRIM(BOTH '#' FROM c.ownerid) as agent_id,
    c.createddate,
    c.closeddate
  FROM "Case" c
  WHERE c.createddate >= '2023-05-02'
    AND c.createddate <= '2023-09-02'
    AND TRIM(c.status) = 'Closed'
    AND c.closeddate != 'None'
    AND c.closeddate IS NOT NULL
),
OwnerAssignmentCounts AS (
  SELECT 
    ch.caseid__c as case_id,
    COUNT(*) as assignment_count
  FROM casehistory__c ch
  WHERE ch.field__c = 'Owner Assignment'
    AND ch.caseid__c IN (SELECT case_id FROM ClosedCases)
  GROUP BY ch.caseid__c
),
NonTransferredCases AS (
  SELECT 
    cc.case_id,
    cc.agent_id,
    cc.createddate,
    cc.closeddate,
    EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM 
      (TO_TIMESTAMP(cc.closeddate, 'YYYY-MM-DD"T"HH24:MI:SS.USOF') - 
       TO_TIMESTAMP(cc.createddate, 'YYYY-MM-DD"T"HH24:MI:SS.USOF'))
    ) / 3600.0 as handle_time_hours
  FROM ClosedCases cc
  JOIN OwnerAssignmentCounts oac ON cc.case_id = oac.case_id
  WHERE oac.assignment_count = 1
),
AgentStats AS (
  SELECT 
    agent_id,
    COUNT(*) as case_count,
    AVG(handle_time_hours) as avg_handle_time_hours
  FROM NonTransferredCases
  WHERE agent_id IS NOT NULL
    AND agent_id != ''
  GROUP BY agent_id
  HAVING COUNT(*) > 1
)
SELECT agent_id
FROM AgentStats
ORDER BY avg_handle_time_hours ASC
LIMIT 1
"}

function.arguments:
{"db_name": "support", "query": "
-- Normalize all IDs by trimming # from both case and case history
WITH ClosedCases AS (
  SELECT 
    TRIM(BOTH '#' FROM c.id) as case_id,
    TRIM(BOTH '#' FROM c.ownerid) as agent_id,
    c.createddate,
    c.closeddate
  FROM "Case" c
  WHERE c.createddate >= '2023-05-02'
    AND c.createddate <= '2023-09-02'
    AND TRIM(c.status) = 'Closed'
    AND c.closeddate != 'None'
    AND c.closeddate IS NOT NULL
),
AssignmentCounts AS (
  SELECT 
    TRIM(BOTH '#' FROM ch.caseid__c) as case_id,
    COUNT(*) as assignment_count
  FROM casehistory__c ch
  WHERE ch.field__c = 'Owner Assignment'
  GROUP BY TRIM(BOTH '#' FROM ch.caseid__c)
)
SELECT 
  cc.agent_id,
  COUNT(*) as num_cases,
  AVG(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM 
    (TO_TIMESTAMP(cc.closeddate, 'YYYY-MM-DD"T"HH24:MI:SS.USOF') - 
     TO_TIMESTAMP(cc.createddate, 'YYYY-MM-DD"T"HH24:MI:SS.USOF'))
  ) / 3600.0) as avg_hours
FROM ClosedCases cc
JOIN AssignmentCounts ac ON cc.case_id = ac.case_id
WHERE ac.assignment_count = 1
  AND cc.agent_id != ''
GROUP BY cc.agent_id
HAVING COUNT(*) > 1
ORDER BY avg_hours ASC
LIMIT 1
"}

WITH ClosedCases AS (

    AND c.createddate <= '2023-09-02'

    AND c.closeddate IS NOT NULL
    AND c.closeddate != 'None'
),
CaseAssignments AS (
  SELECT 
    TRIM(BOTH '#' FROM ch.caseid__c) as case_id,
    ch.field__c
  FROM casehistory__c ch
  WHERE ch.field__c = 'Owner Assignment'
)
SELECT

GROUP BY cc.agent_id
HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT cc.case_id) > 1
ORDER BY cc.agent_id
LIMIT 10

{"db_name": "support", "query": "
WITH ClosedCases AS (
  SELECT 
    TRIM(BOTH '#' FROM c.id) as case_id,
    TRIM(BOTH '#' FROM c.ownerid) as agent_id,
    c.createddate,
    c.closeddate,

function.arguments:
{"db_name": "support", "query": "
-- Get all closed cases with handle times, regardless of assignment count
-- This will show us which cases were transferred and which were not
WITH ClosedCases AS (
  SELECT 
    TRIM(BOTH '#' FROM c.id) as case_id,
    TRIM(BOTH '#' FROM c.ownerid) as final_agent_id,
    c.createddate,
    c.closeddate,
    EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM 
      (TO_TIMESTAMP(c.closeddate, 'YYYY-MM-DD"T"HH24:MI:SS.USOF') - 
       TO_TIMESTAMP(c.createddate, 'YYYY-MM-DD"T"HH24:MI:SS.USOF'))
    ) / 3600.0 as handle_hours
  FROM "Case" c
  WHERE c.createddate >= '2023-05-02'
    AND c.createddate <= '2023-09-02'
    AND TRIM(c.status) LIKE 'Closed%'
    AND c.closeddate IS NOT NULL
    AND c.closeddate != 'None'
),
AssignmentDetails AS (
  SELECT 
    TRIM(BOTH '#' FROM ch.caseid__c) as case_id,
    COUNT(*) as assignment_count,
    STRING_AGG(ch.newvalue__c, '->' ORDER BY ch.createddate) as assignment_chain
  FROM casehistory__c ch
  WHERE ch.field__c = 'Owner Assignment'
  GROUP BY TRIM(BOTH '#' FROM ch.caseid__c)
)
SELECT 
  cc.case_id,
  cc.final_agent_id,
  cc.handle_hours,
  COALESCE(ad.assignment_count, 0) as assignments
FROM ClosedCases cc
LEFT JOIN AssignmentDetails ad ON cc.case_id = ad.case_id
ORDER BY cc.handle_hours ASC
"}
